columns.name: is_public_ip
columns.description: Indicates if the asset has a public IP address

columns.name: open_ports
columns.description: Number of open ports on the asset

columns.name: weak_tls
columns.description: Indicates if the asset has weak TLS configurations

columns.name: geo_risky
columns.description: Indicates if the asset is located in a geo-risky area

columns.name: scanned_at
columns.description: Timestamp of when the asset was scanned

columns.name: updated_at
columns.description: Timestamp of when the asset was last updated

grain: One row represents the exposure details of a specific asset at a specific time.
data_quality_concerns: asset_id is a STRING and may not be unique if not properly managed.
Boolean fields (is_public_ip, weak_tls, geo_risky) may have null values if not explicitly set.
recommended_transformations: Ensure asset_id is unique and properly indexed.
Consider adding default values for Boolean fields to avoid nulls.
Implement data validation rules to ensure the integrity of open_ports.
